heading: Minority business enterprise utilization
label: 1066g Minority business enterprise utilization
text: In the performance of and with respect to the Secretary’s effectuation of his responsibilities under and to the maximum extent feasible in the implementation of the purposes of this part, minority business persons, including bond underwriters and credit enhancers, bond counsel, marketers, accountants, advisors, construction contractors, and managers should be utilized.section 1066d(1) of this title
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to renumbering by .section 1132c–7 of this titlePub. L. 105–244
